name: Crunchy Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the granulated sugar, firmly packed brown sugar, and 1/2 teaspoon of salt in a large mixing bowl until smooth.
2. Add the butter or margarine to the mixture and continue creaming until well combined.
3. Incorporate the crunchy peanut butter into the mixture until thoroughly blended.
4. Beat the egg and vanilla extract into the mixture until light and fluffy.
5. Sift together the all-purpose flour and baking soda, then gradually blend them into the mixture.
6. Form small balls (about 1-inch diameter) from the dough and place them about 2-inches apart on ungreased cookie sheets.
7. Using a floured fork, create a criss-cross design to flatten each cookie slightly.
8. Bake in a hot oven at 400°F for 6-7 minutes, or until the edges are light brown.
9. Allow the cookies to cool before storing them in an airtight container.
Yield: 6 dozen cookies.
